title: lagrezia angustifolia
intro: Lagrezia angustifolia, also known as the Narrow-leaved Lagrezia, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States, particularly in Arizona, and northern Mexico. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lagrezia angustifolia include its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lagrezia angustifolia are typically made from the dried leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
